policy_name: Agency staff manage their own patients
raw_sql: ALTER POLICY "Agency staff manage their own patients" ON "public"."agency_patients" TO authenticated USING ((((agency_id = get_my_company_id()) AND (get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['b2b'::text, 'agency_admin'::text]))) OR (get_user_role() = 'admin'::text))) WITH CHECK ((((agency_id = get_my_company_id()) AND (get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['b2b'::text, 'agency_admin'::text]))) OR (get_user_role() = 'admin'::text)));

ALTER POLICY "Staff insert companies" ON "public"."companies" TO authenticated WITH CHECK ((get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'warehouse'::text])));

ALTER POLICY "Staff update companies" ON "public"."companies" TO authenticated USING ((get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'warehouse'::text]))) WITH CHECK ((get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'warehouse'::text])));
ALTER POLICY "Users can view relevant companies" ON "public"."companies" TO authenticated USING (((id = get_my_company_id()) OR (get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'warehouse'::text]))));

ALTER POLICY "Everyone can update inventory" ON "public"."inventory" TO authenticated USING ((get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'warehouse'::text, 'retail'::text, 'b2b'::text, 'driver'::text]))) WITH CHECK ((get_user_role() = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'warehouse'::text, 'retail'::text, 'b2b'::text, 'driver'::text])));
